description.add: Configure a new channel for your managed site
description.edit: Update channel settings and routing information
description.view: Review the current channel settings and routing information

groups.hint: Groups are sourced from your managed site
groups.label: Channel Groups

key.label: API Key
key.placeholder: Enter the upstream provider API key
key.realKeyHint: If the channel list omitted or masked the full key, load the real key here. Some managed-site types may require extra verification.

models.hint: Type to search or press Enter to add a custom model name
models.label: Available Models

priority.hint: Channels with larger priority numbers are used before others
priority.label: Priority

type.hint: Choose the upstream provider that this channel will forward to
type.label: Channel Type

weight.hint: Controls load balancing within the same priority (0 = equal distribution)
weight.label: Weight

messages.loadRealKeyFailed: Failed to load the real channel key: {{error}}

validation.baseUrlRequired: Base URL is required for this channel type
validation.modelsRequired: At least one model is required

channelExists.description: A channel named {{channelName}} already exists in your managed site. You can still create another channel, but duplicate routing may occur. Continue anyway?
channelExists.title: Channel already exists

exactDuplicate.description: A duplicate candidate channel {{channelName}} has now been confirmed in the managed site. If you want to avoid duplication, adjust the name, models, or key before saving; otherwise, you can still continue creating the channel.
exactDuplicate.title: Confirmed duplicate channel

modelsPrefillFailed.description: No usable upstream model list was loaded for this API key. You can still create the channel, but enter and confirm the models manually before saving.
modelsPrefillFailed.title: Models Require Manual Input

reviewSuggested.description: Candidate channels were found under the same upstream URL or model setup, but an exact duplicate could not be confirmed automatically. You can still continue creating the channel, but review the name, models, and key before saving.
reviewSuggested.title: Review potential duplicate candidates

verificationRequired.description: Candidate channels were found, but New API requires an extra verification step before the real channel key can be read, so exact duplicate confirmation is currently unavailable. You can still continue creating the channel; complete verification first if you need an exact deduplication check.
verificationRequired.title: Potential duplicate needs verification
